# Check the current state after toggling all horizontal bars
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

print("=== Right panel button area ===")
for r in range(32, 51):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][37:59]}")

print("\n=== Left panel button area ===")
for r in range(32, 51):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][7:28]}")

# Check if there are any www bars remaining in the right panel
has_www = False
for r in range(32, 51):
    if 'www' in ascii_lines[r][37:59] or 'w' in ascii_lines[r][37:59]:
        print(f"Row {r} has w: {ascii_lines[r][37:59]}")
        has_www = True

if not has_www:
    print("No www bars remaining in right panel")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
